ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "age_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Name of the age category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for each category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_categories" (
  "sex_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_category" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pregnancy_status" (
  "pregnancy_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pregnancy status */,
  "pregnancy_status" TEXT /* Name of the pregnancy status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pregnancy status */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the pregnancy status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pregnancy_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chronic_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chronic condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the chronic condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chronic condition */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the chronic condition */,
  "severity_levels" TEXT /* Severity levels of the chronic condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_history" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel status */,
  "travel_status" TEXT /* Name of the travel status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel status */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the travel status */,
  "travel_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the location type */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the ethnicity */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Population percentage of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or region */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state or region */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the state or region */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
